'''鈭歵h-z-k''' ('''shathazak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mythopoeticize|mythopoeticize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-z-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mythopoeticize|mythopoeticize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-z-k
|-
! Lemma
| shathazak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithazak|thithazak]] || [[word:jithazak|jithazak]] || [[word:shithazak|shithazak]] || [[word:kithazak|kithazak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthazak|thuthuthazak]] || [[word:jujuthazak|jujuthazak]] || [[word:shushuthazak|shushuthazak]] || [[word:kukuthazak|kukuthazak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthazak|thuthazak]] || [[word:juthazak|juthazak]] || [[word:shuthazak|shuthazak]] || [[word:kuthazak|kuthazak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthazak|thuthazak]] || [[word:juthazak|juthazak]] || [[word:shuthazak|shuthazak]] || [[word:kuthazak|kuthazak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethazak|thethazak]] || [[word:jethazak|jethazak]] || [[word:shethazak|shethazak]] || [[word:kethazak|kethazak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothazak|thothothazak]] || [[word:jojothazak|jojothazak]] || [[word:shoshothazak|shoshothazak]] || [[word:kokothazak|kokothazak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothazak|thothazak]] || [[word:jothazak|jothazak]] || [[word:shothazak|shothazak]] || [[word:kothazak|kothazak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothazak|thothazak]] || [[word:jothazak|jothazak]] || [[word:shothazak|shothazak]] || [[word:kothazak|kothazak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thazak|th忙thazak]] || [[word:j忙thazak|j忙thazak]] || [[word:sh忙thazak|sh忙thazak]] || [[word:k忙thazak|k忙thazak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathazak|thathathazak]] || [[word:jajathazak|jajathazak]] || [[word:shashathazak|shashathazak]] || [[word:kakathazak|kakathazak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathazak|thathazak]] || [[word:jathazak|jathazak]] || [[word:shathazak|shathazak]] || [[word:kathazak|kathazak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathazak|thathazak]] || [[word:jathazak|jathazak]] || [[word:shathazak|shathazak]] || [[word:kathazak|kathazak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathazak|shathazak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathazak|goshathazak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathazak|gokishathazak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathazakn眉|shathazakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathazaknkn眉|goshathazaknkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazakn眉|gokishathazakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathazaksh毛|shathazaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathazaknksh毛|goshathazaknksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathazaksh毛|gokishathazaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazakro|shathazakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazaknkro|goshathazaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazakro|gokishathazakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazakmu|shathazakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazaknkmu|goshathazaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazakmu|gokishathazakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathazaksher|shathazaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathazaknksher|goshathazaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathazaksher|gokishathazaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathazakng|shathazakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathazaknkng|goshathazaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathazakng|gokishathazakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathazakya|shathazakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathazaknkya|goshathazaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathazakya|gokishathazakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathazakyam|shathazakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathazaknkyam|goshathazaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathazakyam|gokishathazakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazakn眉sh毛|shathazakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazaknkn眉sh毛|goshathazaknkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazakn眉sh毛|gokishathazakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazakn眉ro|shathazakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazaknkn眉ro|goshathazaknkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazakn眉ro|gokishathazakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazakn眉mu|shathazakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazaknkn眉mu|goshathazaknkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazakn眉mu|gokishathazakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazaksh毛n眉|shathazaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazaknksh毛n眉|goshathazaknksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazaksh毛n眉|gokishathazaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazaksh毛ro|shathazaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazaknksh毛ro|goshathazaknksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazaksh毛ro|gokishathazaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazaksh毛mu|shathazaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazaknksh毛mu|goshathazaknksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazaksh毛mu|gokishathazaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazakron眉|shathazakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazaknkron眉|goshathazaknkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazakron眉|gokishathazakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazakrosh毛|shathazakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazaknkrosh毛|goshathazaknkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazakrosh毛|gokishathazakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazakromu|shathazakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazaknkromu|goshathazaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazakromu|gokishathazakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazakmun眉|shathazakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazaknkmun眉|goshathazaknkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazakmun眉|gokishathazakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazakmush毛|shathazakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazaknkmush毛|goshathazaknkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazakmush毛|gokishathazakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazakmuro|shathazakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazaknkmuro|goshathazaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazakmuro|gokishathazakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|a27364f}}
